user.title: Websocket Event Filter
user.description: Choose how to filter the websocket entity stream.

data_description.mode: Deny list blocks the entities you specify and forwards everything else. Allow list only forwards the entities you specify and drops everything else.

deny.title: Deny List Rules
deny.description: Entities matching any rule below will be blocked. Everything else is forwarded.

data_description.deny_prefixes: Block entities whose IDs start with any of these strings, e.g. sensor.gem_, sensor.high_freq_
data_description.deny_patterns: Block entities matching any of these regular expressions, e.g. ^sensor\.gem_.*$

allow.title: Allow List Rules
allow.description: Only entities matching at least one rule below will be forwarded. Everything else is blocked.

data_description.allow_prefixes: Forward entities whose IDs start with any of these strings, e.g. light., switch., input_boolean.
data_description.allow_patterns: Forward entities matching any of these regular expressions, e.g. ^(light|switch)\.

abort.single_instance_allowed: Only one instance of Websocket Event Filter can be configured.

init.title: Websocket Event Filter
init.description: Change the filter mode. You will configure the rules on the next screen.

data_description.mode: Switching modes will clear the rules from the previous mode.

deny.title: Deny List Rules
deny.description: Entities matching any rule below will be blocked. Everything else is forwarded.

data_description.deny_prefixes: Block entities whose IDs start with any of these strings, e.g. sensor.gem_, sensor.high_freq_
data_description.deny_patterns: Block entities matching any of these regular expressions, e.g. ^sensor\.gem_.*$

allow.title: Allow List Rules
allow.description: Only entities matching at least one rule below will be forwarded. Everything else is blocked.

data_description.allow_prefixes: Forward entities whose IDs start with any of these strings, e.g. light., switch., input_boolean.
data_description.allow_patterns: Forward entities matching any of these regular expressions, e.g. ^(light|switch)\.

error.invalid_regex: One or more patterns are not valid regular expressions.
